scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @simforge/shared && concurrently -n shared,web,api -c yellow,cyan,green "npm run dev --workspace @simforge/shared" "npm run dev --workspace @simforge/web" "npm run dev --workspace @simforge/api"
scripts.dev:api: npm run build --workspace @simforge/shared && npm run dev --workspace @simforge/api
scripts.build: npm run db:generate && npm run build --workspace @simforge/shared && npm run build --workspace @simforge/api && npm run build --workspace @simforge/web
